importlib.resources.abc/Traversable/join.name: joinpath
importlib.resources.abc/Traversable/join.description: Traverse directories according to pathsegments and return the result as Traversable. Each pathsegments argument may contain multiple names separated by forward slashes (/, posixpath.sep ). For example, the following are equivalent: files.joinpath('subdir', 'subsuddir', 'file.txt') files.joinpath('subdir/subsuddir/file.txt') Note that some Traversable implementations might not be updated to the latest version of the protocol. For compatibility with such implementations, provide a single argume...
